summary: US-015 Draw Three Keep One mode is fully implemented. The `drawThree` domain function in `src/domain/drawRandom.ts` draws 3 unique cards via sequential `drawOne` calls. The `DrawThreeKeepOne` component in `src/features/play/DrawThreeKeepOne.tsx` implements a 3-phase flow (ready → choosing → kept) with keyboard-accessible card selection, new round, and reset functionality. Routing (`#/play/draw-three`) and nav link ('Draw 3') are configured. All 232 unit tests pass including 12 drawThree domain tests and 22 component tests. E2e smoke tests cover navigation, drawing, selection, new round, and reset flows.
